summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nivant Lodge Reservation System. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 12 features verified. Reservation system fully functional with create, list, check-in, cancel, guest search, and calendar view.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/bookings/reserve - Creates reservation with RV- prefix booking_id
Backend: GET /api/bookings/reservations - Lists all reserved bookings (status='reserved')
Backend: POST /api/bookings/reserve/{id}/checkin - Converts reservation to active, room becomes occupied
Backend: POST /api/bookings/reserve/{id}/cancel - Changes status to 'cancelled'
Backend: GET /api/guests/search?q=name_or_phone - Returns matching guests (min 2 chars)
Backend: GET /api/bookings/calendar?month=YYYY-MM - Returns grouped calendar data
Backend: Double booking prevention - Returns 400 for same room/date
Backend: WhatsApp reservation_confirmation message logged after reservation
Backend: Advance payment recorded as 'reservation_advance' transaction
Backend: Check-in non-reserved booking returns 400
Backend: Cancel non-reserved booking returns 400
Backend: Non-existent booking returns 404
Backend: Guest search requires minimum 2 characters
Backend: Calendar defaults to current month
Backend: Existing test reservation RV-E5DF8CE7 found (Suresh Sharma, Room 201, ₹500 advance)
Frontend: /reservations page loads with List/Calendar toggle
Frontend: '+ New' button present and functional
Frontend: Calendar view shows month navigation (prev/next buttons)
Frontend: Calendar dates with reservations highlighted in blue
Frontend: Calendar dates with active bookings highlighted in red
Frontend: New reservation form has guest search input
Frontend: New reservation form has guest details (name, phone, WhatsApp)
Frontend: New reservation form has date picker
Frontend: New reservation form has room grid with prices
Frontend: New reservation form has payment section (rate, advance, cash/UPI)
Frontend: New reservation form has booking source selector
Frontend: List view shows existing reservation with cancel button

mocked_apis.WhatsApp Business API: Messages logged to DB with 'mocked_sent' status - reservation_confirmation sent on booking

seed_data_creation: Test reservation RV-E5DF8CE7 exists for Suresh Sharma, Room 201, 2026-04-10, ₹500 advance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reservation system fully tested. All 12 features verified: 1) POST /api/bookings/reserve creates RV- prefixed booking, 2) GET /api/bookings/reservations lists reserved bookings, 3) POST /api/bookings/reserve/{id}/checkin converts to active, 4) POST /api/bookings/reserve/{id}/cancel changes to cancelled, 5) GET /api/guests/search returns matching guests (min 2 chars), 6) GET /api/bookings/calendar returns grouped data by date, 7) Double booking returns 400, 8) WhatsApp reservation_confirmation logged, 9) Advance recorded as reservation_advance transaction, 10) Frontend list/calendar toggle works, 11) Calendar shows month navigation with highlighted dates, 12) New reservation form has all required elements.

features_verified.frontend_new_form: ✓ Guest search, details, date, room grid, payment, source
